chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Criminal Misc. Application No.1021 of 2024 (Muhammad Shahzad Gujjar ) vs. The State) Date Order with signature of Judge 18.12.2024. Mr. Saeed Ahmed, advocate for applicant Mr. Khalid Iqbal, advocate for proposed accused Mr. Noman Ali, advocate files power on behalf of proposed accused Mr. Shoaib Safdar, APG a/w SI/IO Mirza Athar Baig, PS Baloch Colony, Karachi O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant filed an application u/s 22-A & 22-B CrPC against the proposed accused, who are working in CTD Police Department alleging that they had abducted him on 27.08.2024, maltreated, and abused him and kept him in confinement for whole night and released him in the morning. This application was dismissed vide impugned order dated 25.09.2024, which he has challenged in this criminal miscellaneous application. 2. During the pendency of this application, an enquiry to ascertain the truth was entrusted to SI Mirza Athar Baig of Police Station Baloch Colony, Karachi. He has filed a report, which is taken on record. According to it, no such incident has happened and allegations are false and fabricated. 3. In view of above, this criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed. However, applicant would still at liberty to avail a remedy u/s 200 CrPC. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A
